description: A collaborative project management tool featuring kanban boards for visualizing workflows. Teams can organize tasks, track progress, and communicate in real-time to improve productivity and coordination across projects.
features: Create and customize kanban boards with columns
Assign tasks to team members with due dates
File attachments and comments on tasks
Search and filter tasks by status or assignee
userFlows: User signs up and creates a profile
User creates a new project and kanban board
User invites team members to join the project
User adds tasks to the kanban board with details
User drags tasks between columns to update status
Team members comment and attach files to tasks
User views progress analytics on dashboard
User receives notifications for task updates
constraints: Must be responsive across desktop and mobile devices
Secure user authentication and data protection
Scalable to support large teams and projects
